episodes.title: Was Jeffrey Epstein working for the KGB? | Covert Connections
episodes.description:
A report in the Daily Mail quoted intelligence sources claiming that Jeffrey Epstein was running a KGB Honeytrap operation. What's the truth behind this extraordinary suggestion and what evidence is to be found in the millions of documents in the Epstein Files? We go through all the key connections Epstein made with Russian businessmen, Kremlin insiders and politicians, including his numerous attempts to contact Vladimir Putin. We also explore claims that there were attempts to use the Russian intelligence tactic of obtaining 'kompromat' on businessmen and political figures.

Let us know what connections you want us to explore in the comments below!

#EpsteinFiles #Epstein #KGB #Putin
